page_metadata.biotools__summary: TransAT is a package within the R programming language for converting RefSeq ID to Ensembl ID and mapping the genomic position, followed by providing variant allele frequencies and gene annotations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TransAT is a package within the R programming language for converting RefSeq ID to Ensembl ID and mapping the genomic position, followed by providing variant allele frequencies and gene annotations.
